steps: Contact Deutsche Bank Custody to initiate refund of EUR 3,093.75 overpayment on DBK dividend (account 801234567)
Submit formal claim referencing DE-NO tax treaty Article 10 requiring 26.375% withholding rate, not 25% applied
Provide documentation showing Norwegian tax residency and treaty entitlement for reduced withholding
If custodian disputes, file direct refund claim with German BZSt using Kapitalertragsteuer-Erstattungsverfahren

references.title: BZSt – Capital Yield Tax Relief / Refund Procedures
